screenshots.title: Operations overview
screenshots.purpose: Show installation health, governed work, artifacts, agents, and recent decisions in one operational summary.

screenshots.title: Durable work
screenshots.purpose: Show task state across reasoning, perception, and simulation workloads.

screenshots.title: Governed artifact catalog
screenshots.purpose: Show immutable outputs, media types, release state, ownership, and provenance at catalog scale.

screenshots.title: Reasoning artifact detail
screenshots.purpose: Show a real reasoning result with governed preview, recording provenance, identity, and effective access.

screenshots.title: Perception video artifact
screenshots.purpose: Show a governed video preview produced from a recording analysis.

screenshots.title: Continuous recording playback
screenshots.purpose: Show one recording timeline presented continuously across its authorized storage segments.

screenshots.title: Reason MCP capability surface
screenshots.purpose: Show tools, resources, prompts, tasks, subscriptions, notifications, completions, and required scopes for one server.

screenshots.title: Map MCP capability surface
screenshots.purpose: Show the richer tool, resource, prompt, and protocol inventory of the map server.

screenshots.title: Interactive MCP chart app
screenshots.purpose: Show structured MCP tool output rendered as an interactive, server-shipped chart inside the Console sandbox.
screenshots.data: The recipe calls create_chart_view with deterministic inline mission data. The call is stateless.

screenshots.title: Governed map administration app
screenshots.purpose: Show authoritative map sources and the acquisition, release, and mobility-profile controls delivered by the map server.

screenshots.title: Interactive forecast app
screenshots.purpose: Show observed fleet-readiness series, forecast means, and uncertainty bands in the server-shipped forecast view.
screenshots.data: The recipe sends a deterministic protocol fixture through the MCP App tool-input and tool-result notifications. It does not create a durable forecast artifact.

screenshots.title: GPU-backed 3D View MCP App
screenshots.purpose: Show a live Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles scene, camera controls, and captured-frame state in the Console-hosted View MCP App.
screenshots.data: The operator creates a real governed view, waits for the selected 3D Tiles layer to settle, and captures one rendered frame before recording the prepared browser tab.

rendering.surface: sandboxed View MCP App in Console

screenshots.title: View MCP App in Claude
screenshots.purpose: Show the same server-shipped interactive 3D view running inside an external MCP host after a natural-language tool invocation.
screenshots.data: The external host calls view__create_view through MCP and renders the app resource returned by that successful tool result.

rendering.surface: View MCP App in an external MCP host

screenshots.title: Work Context access
screenshots.purpose: Show active Work Context membership, policy revision, actor authority, and the access-request workflow.

screenshots.title: Paged audit trail
screenshots.purpose: Show bounded, exportable policy decisions with action, resource, outcome, trace, and source context.

screenshots.title: Cluster inventory
screenshots.purpose: Show Kubernetes workloads, pods, services, storage, placement, readiness, and image identity.

screenshots.title: UAV over San Salvador in Isaac Sim
screenshots.purpose: Show a live UAV flight above San Salvador photogrammetry rendered by headless Isaac Sim.

screenshots.title: UAV over Midtown Manhattan in Isaac Sim
screenshots.purpose: Show a live UAV flight against dense New York photogrammetry rendered by headless Isaac Sim.

screenshots.title: UAV simulation in Rerun
screenshots.purpose: Show the UAV world, camera stream, telemetry, and recording timeline in the native Rerun workspace.

screenshots.title: SUMO traffic simulation in Rerun
screenshots.purpose: Show the Luxembourg road network, live vehicles, congestion telemetry, and simulation time.
